ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_no" TEXT /* Flight number */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "departure_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departure airport */,
  "arrival_airport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrival airport */,
  "std_hour" INTEGER /* Scheduled time of departure (hour of the day) */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "is_claim" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a claim has been filed for the flight (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "flight_duration" REAL /* Estimated duration of the flight in hours */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight (e.g., scheduled, in transit, landed, canceled) */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the airport for boarding and deplaning */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal at the airport where the flight operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrival_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_departure_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the airline */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the airline's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the airline's official website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that experienced the delay */,
  "delay_time" REAL /* Duration of the delay in hours */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_type" TEXT /* Type of delay (e.g., weather, mechanical, air traffic control) */,
  "delay_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the delay */,
  "delay_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the delay */,
  "responsible_party" TEXT /* Party responsible for the delay (e.g., airline, airport, weather service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight for which the claim is filed */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger filing the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was filed */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed by the passenger */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "claim_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the claim */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., delay, lost luggage, injury) */,
  "compensation_type" TEXT /* Type of compensation provided (e.g., refund, voucher, upgrade) */,
  "claim_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the resolution of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the passenger */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "actual_departure" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "actual_arrival" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight is scheduled */,
  "recurrence" TEXT /* Recurrence pattern of the flight schedule (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the schedule was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., takeoff, landing, maintenance) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or details of the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "logged_by" TEXT /* Name or ID of the person who logged the entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_personnel" (
  "personnel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personnel entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "personnel_type" TEXT /* Type of personnel (e.g., pilot, co-pilot, flight attendant) */,
  "personnel_name" TEXT /* Name of the personnel */,
  "personnel_role" TEXT /* Role of the personnel (e.g., captain, first officer) */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the personnel (if applicable) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the personnel */,
  "training_level" TEXT /* Training level or certification of the personnel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("personnel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_personnel_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment entry */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., aircraft, navigation system) */,
  "equipment_serial" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_equipment_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., pilot, ground staff, customer service, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., operations, customer service, IT) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user (for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
